name: Policy can't be verified — one retry, then human
notes: Caller is safe, but the policy number doesn't verify. The agent re-reads it, lets the caller retry once, and when it still fails escalates to a human without looping.
source_pointer: Authored reference for the policy-not-found path; mirrors flow_identify → flow_route_verified (xp_rv_bad) → flow_policy_not_found (retry once via xp_pnf_retry, then xp_pnf_human).

turns.text: Hi, Northwind claims line — this is Quinn. Before anything else, is everyone okay? Are you somewhere safe right now?
Yeah, I'm fine, just shaken. I need to report a fender bender.
I'm glad you're okay. Can I get your name and policy number?
Pat Lin, policy one two three four five.
Let me read that back: 1-2-3-4-5. Sound right?
Hmm — I'm not finding that policy. Want to try the number again, in case I misheard?
Maybe it's one two three four six?
Let me read that back: 1-2-3-4-6. Trying that now.
I'm still not finding an active policy on that number. Rather than keep you guessing, let me get a claims agent on the line to look this up manually. One moment.
